3152880.name: Quakeline
3152880.description:
Can you survive in the shattered streets of Istanbul after the anticipated major earthquake? Embark on a journey through a completely hand-drawn Istanbul that challenges humanity’s most basic instincts and hopes.



Realistic Istanbul: In this game, you will navigate a meticulously recreated Istanbul, where new stories and challenges await at every corner. The struggle for survival amidst chaos takes place against the backdrop of the city's iconic landmarks.

Handcrafted Art: Every visual has been carefully hand-drawn to give the game a unique aesthetic. Each detail reflects the texture and emotions of the city and its characters.

Deep Storyline: On this challenging journey to reach your girlfriend, you’ll face not only physical obstacles but also emotional and psychological trials. As you progress through the ruins of Istanbul, the characters you meet and their stories will deeply impact you.

Interactive Mini-Games: The game features interactive mechanics such as code-breaking and lock-picking mini-games that diversify the gameplay and keep you constantly engaged. These mini-games are seamlessly integrated into the story.

Awareness and Preparedness: "Quake Istanbul" is a project aimed at raising awareness about the potential Istanbul earthquake. The game presents a fictional story based on the likelihood of a real event, encouraging players to think and be prepared.

Witness the struggle for survival and the power of hope in "Quake Istanbul." In this unforgettable adventure, you’ll not only find a path through the ruins but also explore the deepest and purest emotions of humanity.
